shopping_140.POSSIBLE REASONS FOR FAILURE: The agent stopped searching after reviewing only the first page of products. The objective implies a comprehensive search for the item, and the page clearly indicated "Items 1-12 of 536", meaning there were many more products to check on subsequent pages. The agent failed to navigate to the next pages to continue the search.
shopping_140.REFLECTION: When an objective requires finding a specific item and the current page displays only a subset of available results (e.g., "Items 1-12 of 536"), always check for and utilize pagination controls (like "Next" buttons or page numbers) to extend the search to subsequent pages until the item is found or all relevant pages have been checked. Do not stop prematurely if more results are indicated.
